name: budget-bot
description: Build and query Philippine GAA and NEP budget spreadsheet files.

interface.shortDescription: Build SQLite budget databases and query Philippine budget data.
interface.longDescription: Budget Bot ingests Philippine GAA and NEP budget XLSX files, builds year-specific SQLite databases, generates department and agency lookup JSONs, and gives agents reusable instructions for transparent budget analysis.
defaultPrompt: Build budget SQLite databases from raw XLSX files.
Generate lookup JSONs for this budget project.
